questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in San Diego Ca are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in San Diego Ca with weekend hours include: Jackson House La Mesa (Sat: 00:00-24:00), Planned Parenthood - College Avenue Sarah Weddington Health Center (Sat: 07:30-16:00). 2 total with weekend availability.
